lyrics.text: Oh  Oh  Oh Oh Oh Oh
lyrics.translation: 哦（哦）哦（哦）哦，哦

lyrics.text: I'm laying here dreaming Staring at the ceiling
lyrics.translation: 我躺着，盯着天花板做着白日梦

lyrics.text: Wasting the day away
lyrics.translation: 浪费了一整天的时间

lyrics.text: The world's flying by our window outside
lyrics.translation: 世界从我们的窗外飞奔而过

lyrics.text: But hey baby thats OK
lyrics.translation: 但是，嘿，宝贝，这没关系

lyrics.text: This feels so right it can't be wrong
lyrics.translation: 这感觉真棒，不会有错

lyrics.text: So far as I can see
lyrics.translation: 在我能看见的未来里这不会有错

lyrics.text: Where you wanna go baby
lyrics.translation: 你想要去哪，宝贝

lyrics.text: I'll do anything
lyrics.translation: 我会为你做任何事

lyrics.text: Cause if you wanna go Baby let's go
lyrics.translation: 因为如果你想去，宝贝，那我们就出发吧

lyrics.text: If you wanna rock I am ready to roll
lyrics.translation: 如果你想摇摆，我已经准备好了

lyrics.text: And if you wanna slow down
lyrics.translation: 如果你想轻松地、慢慢地度过

lyrics.text: We can slow down together
lyrics.translation: 我们可以一起这么过

lyrics.text: If you wanna walk Baby let's walk
lyrics.translation: 如果你想散散步，宝贝，那我们就一起漫步吧

lyrics.text: Have a little kiss have a little talk
lyrics.translation: 偶尔亲亲嘴，聊聊天

lyrics.text: We don't gotta leave at all
lyrics.translation: 假如不想离开这里，我们就哪儿都不去

lyrics.text: We can lay here forever
lyrics.translation: 我们可以永远躺在这里

lyrics.text: Stay here forever
lyrics.translation: 永远待在这里

lyrics.text: Oh Oh Oh Oh
lyrics.translation: 哦，哦，哦，哦

lyrics.text: If you wanna see that Italian tower leaning
lyrics.translation: 如果你想看到意大利塔倾斜

lyrics.text: Baby we can leave right now
lyrics.translation: 宝贝，我们现在就可以出发

lyrics.text: If that's too far
lyrics.translation: 如果那太远了

lyrics.text: We can jump in the car and take a little trip around town
lyrics.translation: 我们可以跳进车子里，一直绕着小镇旅行

lyrics.text: They say that California is nice and warm this time of year
lyrics.translation: 他们说，加州每年的这个时候是暖融融的

lyrics.text: Baby say the word and we'll just disappear
lyrics.translation: 宝贝，只要你说一句话，我们就可以消失

lyrics.text: Cause if you wanna go Baby let's go
lyrics.translation: 因为如果你想去，宝贝，那我们就出发吧

lyrics.text: If you wanna rock I'm ready to roll
lyrics.translation: 如果你想摇摆，我已经准备好了

lyrics.text: And if you wanna slow down

lyrics.translation: 我们可以一起这么过

lyrics.text: If you wanna walk Baby let's walk
lyrics.translation: 如果你想散散步，宝贝，那我们就一起漫步吧

lyrics.translation: 偶尔亲亲嘴，聊聊天

lyrics.text: We don't gotta leave at all
lyrics.translation: 假如不想离开这里，我们就哪儿都不去

lyrics.text: We can lay here forever
lyrics.translation: 我们可以永远躺在这里

lyrics.text: Stay here forever
lyrics.translation: 永远待在这里

lyrics.text: Oh It's a big world for a boy and a girl
lyrics.translation: 哦，这个大世界里只有我们俩

lyrics.text: Letting go of it all
lyrics.translation: 抛开其他的一切

lyrics.text: Holding on to one another
lyrics.translation: 紧紧拥抱对方

lyrics.text: Oh there's a whole lot of world to discover
lyrics.translation: 哦，我隐藏的内心世界

lyrics.text: Under the covers
lyrics.translation: 你会发现很多

lyrics.text: So if you wanna go Baby lets go
lyrics.translation: 因为如果你想去，宝贝，那我们就出发吧

lyrics.text: If you wanna rock I'm ready to roll
lyrics.translation: 如果你想摇摆，我已经准备好了

lyrics.text: If you wanna slow down
lyrics.translation: 如果你想轻松地、慢慢地度过

lyrics.text: We can slow down together
lyrics.translation: 我们可以一起这么过

lyrics.translation: 如果你想散散步，宝贝，那我们就一起漫步吧

lyrics.translation: 假如不想离开这里，我们就哪儿都不去

lyrics.text: We can lay here forever
lyrics.translation: 我们可以永远躺在这里

lyrics.text: Stay here forever
lyrics.translation: 永远待在这里

lyrics.text: Let's just lay here forever
lyrics.translation: 让我们永远只是躺在这里

lyrics.text: Stay here forever
lyrics.translation: 永远待在这里

lyrics.text: Oh Oh Oh Oh Oh
lyrics.translation: 哦 哦 哦 哦
